hooks.name: harness-resume
hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null || for p in /usr/local/bin/epic-harness ~/.cargo/bin/epic-harness; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; break; fi; done); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" resume || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
hooks.description: Restore session snapshot, load project memory and evolved skills

hooks.name: harness-reflect
hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null || for p in /usr/local/bin/epic-harness ~/.cargo/bin/epic-harness; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; break; fi; done); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" reflect || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
hooks.description: Analyze session observations, evolve skills, gate improvements, save metrics

hooks.name: harness-guard
hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null || for p in /usr/local/bin/epic-harness ~/.cargo/bin/epic-harness; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; break; fi; done); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" guard || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
hooks.description: Scan prompt context for dangerous shell patterns and blocked commands

hooks.name: harness-observe
hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null || for p in /usr/local/bin/epic-harness ~/.cargo/bin/epic-harness; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; break; fi; done); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" observe || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'

hooks.name: harness-mem-observe
hooks.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null || for p in /usr/local/bin/epic-harness ~/.cargo/bin/epic-harness; do if [ -x "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; break; fi; done); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" mem-observe || true
hooks.description: Auto-record architectural decisions and patterns to unified memory store
